goals.title: Part 2 — daemon grace-exit instrumentation
goals.objective: From latest main, instrument grace timer, client detection, socket unlink, and teardown intervals; collect numeric evidence. Implement an evidence-based improvement or justified test comment, never a guessed timeout increase; run full gates, open PR, wait for required checks, squash merge, and report the measurements.
goals.evidence: STEP 12 Part 2 completed via merged PR #135 at 02b0b2d. Ten internal runs measured client-zero-to-grace at 1003/1004/1004ms min/median/max and teardown at 0-1ms. Twenty external runs measured post-adapter-reap-to-unlink at 2328/2353/2380ms. Correlated residual about 1345ms is consistent with adapter-close to daemon EOF/client-zero handoff. Existing 20s timeout retained, adapter reap bounded, all local gates and CI passed. Structured receipt: /tmp/step12-g011-receipt.json.
